sentences.english: I once set the kitchen on fire trying to make fried chicken.
sentences.korean: 한번 프라이드 치킨을 만들다가 부엌에 불을 냈어요.

sentences.english: The oil got too hot and flames shot up.
I tried to bake a cake for my friend's birthday, and it came out completely flat.
sentences.korean: 친구 생일에 케이크를 구우려 했는데 완전히 납작하게 나왔어요.

sentences.english: I forgot to add the baking powder.
I put sugar instead of salt in the soup, and my whole family noticed immediately.
sentences.korean: 수프에 소금 대신 설탕을 넣었고 가족 전체가 바로 알아챘어요.

quiz.question: What does '불을 내다/불붙이다' mean in English?
